parameters.query:
INSERT INTO funil_fgts (
`datetime`, `datetime_last`, `IDUsuarioWPP`, `manychat_key`, `site`, `pagina`, `utm_source`, `utm_campaign`, `utm_term`, `utm_content`, `utm_medium`, `ad_id`, `adset_id`, `campaign_id`, `url_completa`, `ttclid`, `ttp`, `fbp`, `fbc`, `event_id`, `ip`, `user_agent`, `phone`, `email`, `etapa`, `etapa_manychat`, `fbclid`, `gclid`, `_ga`, `mcp_token`, `first_name`, `last_name`, `gender`, `cidade`, `estado`, `pais`, `cpf`, `data_nascimento`, `fgtsbalance`
)
SELECT 
    '{{ ($('Webhook').item.json?.body?.data?.custom_fields?.AD_datetime_enviou_mensagem || $('Webhook').item.json?.body?.data?.subscribed).toDateTime().format("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") }}' AS datetime,
    '{{ $now.format("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") }}' AS datetime_last,
    {{ $('IDUsuarioWPP').item.json.IDUsuarioWPP }} AS IDUsuarioWPP,
    '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data.key }}' AS manychat_key,
    base.site,
    '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data.live_chat_url.replaceAll("https://","") }}' AS pagina,
    base.utm_source,
    base.utm_campaign,
    base.utm_term,
    base.utm_content,
    base.utm_medium,
    base.ad_id,
    base.adset_id,
    base.campaign_id,
    base.url_completa,
    base.ttclid,
    base.ttp,
    base.fbp,
    base.fbc,
    base.event_id,
    base.ip,
    base.user_agent,
    '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data.whatsapp_phone }}' AS phone,
    -- Caso você tenha diferentes fontes para email, pode utilizar CASE para resolver
    CASE 
      WHEN base.email IS NOT NULL THEN base.email
      WHEN {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body?.data?.email || null }} IS NOT NULL THEN {{ "'"+$('Webhook').item.json.body.data.email+"'" || null }}
      WHEN {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data?.custom_fields?.email || null }} IS NOT NULL THEN {{ "'"+$('Webhook').item.json.body.data.custom_fields?.email+"'" || null }}
      WHEN {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data?.custom_fields["2.0_chave_pix"]?.search("@") || null }}>0 THEN {{ "'"+$('Webhook').item.json.body.data?.custom_fields["2.0_chave_pix"]+"'" || null }}
      WHEN {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data?.custom_fields["2.2_data_nascimento"]?.search("@") || null }}>0 THEN {{ "'"+$('Webhook').item.json.body.data?.custom_fields["2.2_data_nascimento"]+"'" || null }}
      ELSE NULL END AS email,
    '{{ $json.etapa_atual }}' AS etapa,
    '1 - Atendimento' AS etapa_manychat,
    base.fbclid,
    base.gclid,
    base._ga,
    base.mcp_token,
    '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data.name.split(' ')[0].toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g, "").trim() || null }}' AS first_name,
    '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data.name.substring($('Webhook').item.json.body.data.name.split(' ')[0].length).toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-zA-Z ]/g,'').trim() || null }}' AS last_name,
    null as gender,
    base.cidade as cidade,
    base.estado as estado,
    base.pais as pais,
    {{ "'"+$('Webhook').item.json?.body?.data?.custom_fields["2.0_chave_pix"]?.substring(0,50)+"'"==undefined?null:"'"+$('Webhook').item.json?.body?.data?.custom_fields["2.0_chave_pix"]?.substring(0,50)+"'" || null }} as cpf,
    {{ "'"+$('Webhook').item.json?.body?.data?.custom_fields["2.2_data_nascimento"]?.replaceAll('-','')+"'"==undefined?null:"'"+$('Webhook').item.json?.body?.data?.custom_fields["2.2_data_nascimento"]?.replaceAll('-','')+"'" || null }} as data_nascimento,
    {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data?.custom_fields["1.1_valor_disponivel"] || null }} AS fgtsbalance
FROM (
    SELECT *
    FROM funil_fgts
    WHERE IDUsuarioWPP = '{{ $json.IDUsuarioWPP }}'
      AND etapa = '{{ $json.etapa_anterior }}'
    ORDER BY datetime_last DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS base;

SELECT *
FROM funil_fgts
WHERE (IDUsuarioWPP = '{{ $json.IDUsuarioWPP }}'
  OR phone = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data.whatsapp_phone }}')
  AND etapa = '{{ $json.etapa_anterior }}'
 AND datetime_last >= NOW() - INTERVAL 6 DAY
ORDER BY datetime_last DESC
LIMIT 1;

    '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data.name.split(' ')[0].toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g, "").trim() || null }}' AS first_name,

    {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.data?.custom_fields["1.1_valor_disponivel"] || null }} AS fgtsbalance
FROM (
